subject: webbing area dimensions
fact: Veris conjured a webbing spell filling a 20-foot cube.

subject: Mass Healing Word effect
fact: Bramgrim's Mass Healing Word spell restored 17 hit points to Daein.

subject: Hail of Thorns level
fact: Akritas cast Hail of Thorns as a bonus action at third level.

subject: Dispel Magic level
fact: Bramgrim cast Dispel Magic at fifth level to shatter the Wall of Force.

subject: Shield Guardian attacks
fact: The Shield Guardian attempted to strike Bramgrim twice but missed both attacks.

subject: session pause
fact: The session paused mid-round as the party prepared their next moves.

subject: Daein's missed shots
fact: Daein missed both shots when attempting to snipe Veris with a longbow.
